name: team drive count from plays
description: Test case for team drive count from plays
expected_query: with "t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(esbid, '_', drive_seq)) AS team_drive_count_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."qtr" in (1) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6_team_stats" as (select "t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6"."nfl_team", sum(t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6.team_drive_count_from_plays) as team_drive_count_from_plays from "t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6" group by "t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", "t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6_team_stats"."team_drive_count_from_plays" AS "team_drive_count_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6_team_stats" on "t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" where player.pos IN ('TEAM') group by "t69483804668d770441ddd794c2973be6_team_stats"."team_drive_count_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
